src_type.description: Type of the source. Possible values include: stream, table, view

name.description: Name of the source whose changes are tracked by the stream

database_name.description: Database name to which stream source type belongs. If not provided, database  name provided in the path param will be used.

schema_name.description: Schema name to which stream source type belongs. If not provided, schema name provided in the path param will be used.
